name: Chicken Scampi & Linguini
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil for the linguini.
2. Heat butter and oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add chicken pieces and cook, stirring constantly, until golden brown.
4. Push chicken to one side of the pan. Add broccoli and red pepper; cook for 2 more minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper, then add lemon juice. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. When the water for the linguini is boiling, cook according to package instructions until al dente. Drain the pasta.
7. Add chicken and vegetable sauce to the cooked linguini; toss to coat evenly.
8. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
